ddls:
CREATE TABLE "quality_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line where the measurement was taken */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being measured */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who performed the measurement */,
  "equipment_id" TEXT /* ID of the equipment used for the measurement */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Calibration status of the equipment */,
  "after" REAL /* Measurement after the specified process */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Sample size of the measurement */,
  "b3p" REAL /* B3P value (efficiency metric) */,
  "b3r" REAL /* B3R value (efficiency metric) */,
  "b3f" REAL /* B3F value (efficiency metric) */,
  "purity" REAL /* Purity measurement */,
  "invpur" REAL /* Inverse purity measurement */,
  "purf" REAL /* Purification factor */,
  "buckets" INTEGER /* Number of buckets used in the process */,
  "obuckets" INTEGER /* Number of overflow buckets */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_measurements_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_measurements_production_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_measurements_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the production line */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the production line */,
  "machine_type" TEXT /* Type of machine used in the production line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production line */,
  "production_capacity" TEXT /* Production capacity of the line */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Scheduled maintenance for the line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "standard_purity" REAL /* Standard purity level expected for the product */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier of the product's raw materials */,
  "material_composition" TEXT /* Composition of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defects" (
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defect record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the defect */,
  "defect_type" TEXT /* Type of defect identified */,
  "defect_description" TEXT /* Description of the defect */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the defect (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "defect_category" TEXT /* Category of the defect (e.g., material, manufacturing) */,
  "root_cause" TEXT /* Identified root cause of the defect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control log entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement associated with the check */,
  "checked_by" TEXT /* User who performed the quality control check */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the quality control check was performed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or findings from the quality check */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of quality check performed (e.g., visual inspection, lab test) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Outcome of the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES quality_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, quality analyst, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., purity alert, time alert) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "recommended_action" TEXT /* Recommended actions to resolve the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES quality_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary entry */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line associated with the summary */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the summary */,
  "average_purity" REAL /* Average purity measured over time */,
  "min_purity" REAL /* Minimum purity recorded */,
  "max_purity" REAL /* Maximum purity recorded */,
  "total_measurements" INTEGER /* Total number of measurements taken */,
  "summary_period" TEXT /* Time period covered by the summary (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "average_defect_rate" REAL /* Average defect rate for the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_summary_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_summary_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert history entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert associated with this history */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., resolved, unresolved) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_comment" TEXT /* Comments on the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_history_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., operator, manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
